title: Unit, Property, Mutation, Headless, GUI, and Play Tests · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs unit, property, mutation, headless, gui, and play tests from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for layered maze verification suite after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate pure unit, property, mutation, integration, Tcl, Tk widget, display, accessibility, package, and player tests.
Generate bounded grids and assert reciprocal walls, connectivity, tree rules, route validity, cost, determinism, and state invariants.
Introduce deliberate wall, queue, heuristic, cancellation, focus, and schema defects and prove named tests fail causally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Playtest Protocol
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Playtest Protocol: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review puzzle team handles case 5918 during a clean desktop release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to combine pure properties, deliberate defects, headless checks, native GUI gates, and player evidence; native Tk behavior must not be inferred from browser execution; then change the seed and retain replay identity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Define representative tasks, accommodations, observation boundaries, barrier severity, consent, privacy, and closure evidence.

Evidence target: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Playtest Protocol.
steps.why: Retrieving Playtest Protocol through the concrete layered maze verification suite case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Playtest Protocol, keep Playtest Protocol connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Define representative tasks, accommodations, observation boundaries, barrier severity, consent, privacy, and closure evidence.

hints: For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Playtest Protocol, name the player, revision, Python, Tcl and Tk versions, grid, coordinate, seed, topology, frontier, path, event, state, render, accessibility, package, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Playtest Protocol precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Playtest Protocol, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A review puzzle team handles case 5918 during a clean desktop release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to combine pure properties, deliberate defects, headless checks, native GUI gates, and player evidence; native Tk behavior must not be inferred from browser execution; then change the seed and retain replay identity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Define representative tasks, accommodations, observation boundaries, barrier severity, consent, privacy, and closure evidence.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Playtest Protocol, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: Watching one developer solve a maze is a learner usability study.
